subject: fix(hooks): eliminate stale closures and timer leaks
body:
BurgerMenu: Clear previous action timer before setting a new one to
prevent leaked handlers on rapid successive calls.

FuelMapWeb: Use stationsRef so map.once('load') handler reads current
stations instead of capturing a stale closure from effect registration.

BottomSheet: Replace snapFull dep with snapFullRef in keyboard effect
to prevent unnecessary listener re-registration on dimension changes.

Tags: audit, bugfix, hooks, closures
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch
